name: zeus-co-chro
description: CHRO (Chief Human Resources Officer) — People Ops completo. 6 skills: chro (chief), chro-orquestrador, chro-recruiting (talent acquisition end-to-end), chro-people-ops (payroll, benefícios, onboarding), chro-learning-development (L&D, career paths), chro-culture (cultura, all-hands, comunicação interna). Cobre CLT + PJ + sócio em diferentes verticais. Cross com clo-trabalhista (legal) e cfo-controller (folha).
